title: atago run --report json
description: Machine-readable report emitted by `atago run --report json` (#43). It carries per-suite/per-scenario status plus enough failure context for an agent to act on. `schema_version` gates compatibility: it is a string bumped only on a breaking change to this document shape, so consumers should branch on it before reading the rest of the document. Note: `duration_ms` fields are wall-clock and therefore non-deterministic; the committed example zeroes them.

schema_version.description: Stable top-level version of the report document. Currently "1".

suites.description: One entry per suite run, regardless of how many suites were requested.

failures.description: Flat list of failures across all scenarios; empty on success.

teardown_failures.description: Teardown steps that failed or errored. Teardown outcomes never change the scenario's status; omitted when clean or absent.

service_logs.description: Preserved background-service log artifacts (#51); omitted when none.

diff.description: Uncolored unified diff for multi-line equals/snapshot failures (#28).

artifacts.description: Durable sidecar files written for a failed assertion when --artifacts-dir is set (#48); omitted when none.

path.description: Stable path relative to the artifacts-dir root.
